metadata.label: Notes
metadata.value: All items have coresponding IIIF 3.0 manifests with internal references to more details. The field seeAlso should be parsed carefully.

metadata.label: Subjects
metadata.value: Travel, Life Styles, Politic, Culture, Art, Architecture, History, Geography, Archeology.

en: This collection includes a selection of manuscripts and drawings related to the Great Ilkhanid Shahnameh, a Persian epic poem written by Ferdowsi. The collection features various artworks and illustrations that depict scenes from the Shahnameh, showcasing the rich cultural heritage of the Ilkhanid period.
